title: INV-014 CAPA-003/004: Tighten SDLC Governance Controls

comment:
REVIEW: CR-100 v0.1 -- COMPLIANT. All review criteria verified with evidence.

FRONTMATTER: title = "INV-014 CAPA-003/004: Tighten SDLC Governance Controls" (present, non-empty). revision_summary = "Initial draft" (appropriate for v0.1; executable documents are self-authorizing per SOP-002 Section 8).

STRUCTURE: All 12 sections required by SOP-002 Section 6 are present: Purpose, Scope (Context, Changes Summary, Files Affected), Current State, Proposed State, Change Description (4 subsections), Justification, Impact Assessment (7.1-7.5 including Development Controls and Qualified State Continuity), Testing Summary, Implementation Plan (3 phases), Execution (14 EIs), Execution Summary, References.

PLACEHOLDER CONTENT: No {{...}} template placeholders found in pre-approved Sections 1-9. Execution-phase [BRACKETS] in Sections 10-12 are expected per template convention.

TRACEABILITY: All referenced documents verified against QMS -- INV-014 (v1.1 IN_EXECUTION, confirmed as parent), SOP-005 (v6.0 EFFECTIVE), TEMPLATE-CR (v9.0 EFFECTIVE), SOP-002 (v15.0 EFFECTIVE), SDLC-QMS-RS (v18.0 EFFECTIVE), SDLC-QMS-RTM (v23.0 EFFECTIVE). Version transitions in Section 7.2 (SOP-005 v6.0->v7.0, TEMPLATE-CR v9.0->v10.0, SOP-002 v15.0->v16.0) are consistent with current effective versions.

CHANGE DESCRIPTION VERIFICATION: All four TEMPLATE-CR "From" texts verified against actual TEMPLATE-CR content at the cited line numbers (104, 205, 273, 345) -- all match exactly. SOP-005 gaps at cited locations (line 128, 165, 184, 186) confirmed present. SOP-002 Section 7.3 confirmed missing PR verification bullet.

DEVELOPMENT CONTROLS (Section 7.4): Properly specifies .test-env/qms-cli/ as development location, branch cr-100, PreToolUse hook enforcement, qualification, CI, PR gate, and submodule update. All seven controls enumerated.

QUALIFIED STATE CONTINUITY (Section 7.5): Before CR: commit 5124b4a, RS v18.0, RTM v23.0, CLI-14.0. During/After: unchanged. The rationale that no RS/RTM update is needed (template content, not functional code with REQ-* requirements) is correct. Running the test suite confirms no regressions without adding new requirements.

IMPLEMENTATION PLAN / EI TABLE: 14 EIs covering pre-execution baseline (EI-1), QMS document changes (EI-2 through EI-7), seed execution branch workflow (EI-8 through EI-13), and post-execution baseline (EI-14). Critical ordering verified: EI-3 (SOP-005 EFFECTIVE) precedes EI-8 (seed work begins), ensuring the rules are in force before the work that must follow them. No VR column entries -- appropriate for procedural/template CR.

TU ASSESSMENT: No Technical Unit assignment required. This CR modifies procedural documents (SOPs) and a template. No application code or functional qms-cli code is changed. Falls entirely within QA procedural compliance domain.

FORMATTING: Consistent heading hierarchy, table formatting, code block usage, and bold emphasis throughout. No typos or grammatical errors found.

FINDING: No deficiencies identified. Recommend for approval.
